title: Archive #0112-REYES | Blackout Protocol
description: A fragmented incident log from Sector 9. An action occurs before its triggering condition exists.

events.label: Station Log
events.text:
Timestamp: 2157-08-02 23:11:44
Entity[Dr. Reyes] on duty at memory block[Sector 9 Control Station].
Power grid status: NOMINAL. Terminal access: AUTHENTICATED.
Restricted file partition [VAULT-9]: LOCKED.

events.label: Generator Override
events.text:
Dr. Reyes moved to the auxiliary panel and manually activated the emergency generator.
Backup systems came online. Primary grid handoff: COMPLETE.
Generator status: RUNNING.
events._bug_note: power_failure is never established -- there is no reason to activate the generator

events.label: Vault Access
events.text:
With backup power routing through the auxiliary bus, the VAULT-9 partition
failed to re-authenticate its lock sequence.
Dr. Reyes accessed the unrestricted partition and copied restricted files.

events.label: Incident Logged
events.text:
Security subsystem recorded an unauthorized partition access at 23:14:02.
Entity[Dr. Reyes] flagged for review.
Archive compile endpoint. Status: INCIDENT LOGGED.
